productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kang Jeans Infant Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue denim jeans in cotton fabric, with light blue and red thread detailing, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back and with an elasticated waistFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one up and about in a pair of jeans that play as hard as he does from gini and jony. Team this with a white tee and crocs footwear when you take him out next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
